# stepsRequired

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Reads and enables pagination through a set of `AppLevelRequirement`.

## Usage

```bash
csdk steps-required --level <String> --roleId <UUID> --first <Int> --offset <Int> --after <Cursor>
```

## Examples

### Run stepsRequired

```bash
csdk steps-required --level <String> --roleId <UUID> --first <Int> --offset <Int> --after <Cursor>
```
